response.overview: Rae, a recent marketing graduate from a privileged background, struggles to find a “real” job while grappling with expectations of success. Her grounded best friend, Malik, her successful twin brother, Ollie, and her visiting friend, Sadie, each offer different perspectives on success and happiness, challenging Rae to reevaluate her life.
response.tagline: When the real world ruffles your feathers
response.title: Learning How To Fly
